parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.item.json;

const prompt = `You are a recipe-generation API. Output ONLY a raw JSON array. NO markdown. NO code blocks. NO backticks. Start your response with [ and end with ]. No text before or after.

INPUTS (read carefully before generating):
- Ingredients: ${d.ingredients}
  The "ingredients" field in every recipe MUST contain ONLY items from this list.
  Copy each ingredient EXACTLY as written — same name, same amount, same unit.
  DO NOT add any ingredient not in this list — not even common ones like Salt, Oil, Water.
  Anything not in this list goes into "extraIngredients" instead.
- Portions: ${d.portions}
- Persons: ${d.persons}
- Cooking time: ${d.cookingTime}
- Cuisine: ${d.cuisine}
- Diet: ${d.diet}

TIME CONSTRAINT — this is absolute:
- cookingTime="Quick"   → "time" must be 5–20
- cookingTime="Medium"  → "time" must be 21–45
- cookingTime="Complex" → "time" must be 46–180
WRONG: cookingTime="Quick" with time=30, cookingTime="Medium" with time=15, cookingTime="Complex" with time=25
CORRECT: cookingTime="Complex" → e.g. 90. cookingTime="Quick" → e.g. 15. cookingTime="Medium" → e.g. 35.

Generate exactly 3 recipes in this JSON structure:
[
  {
    "id": "1",
    "number": 1,
    "title": "Recipe Title",
    "description": "1-2 sentence description.",
    "cuisine": "<lowercase cuisine from input>",
    "time": 90,
    "tags": ["Complex"],
    "ingredients": ["<ingredient from input>"],
    "extraIngredients": ["<anything else needed>"],
    "directions": [
      { "title": "Step title", "text": "Do something for 10 minutes." }
    ],
    "nutrition": { "calories": 600, "protein": 30, "fat": 20, "carbs": 60 },
    "likes": 0
  }
]

Rules:
1. "ingredients": copy ingredient names EXACTLY as they appear in the Ingredients input. Never add new ones.
2. "extraIngredients": anything the recipe needs that is NOT in the Ingredients input.
3. "time": must satisfy the TIME CONSTRAINT above. Re-check before outputting.
4. "cuisine": lowercase, must match the Cuisine input.
5. "tags": must include the cookingTime value. Include the diet tag ONLY if ALL provided ingredients are compatible with that diet. Only use: Quick, Medium, Complex, Vegetarian, Vegan, Keto.
6. "id": "1", "2", "3" as strings. "number": 1, 2, 3 as integers.
7. All text in English.
8. Each direction step must include a duration.
9. If persons > 1, prefix parallel steps with "Person 1:", "Person 2:", shared steps with "All:".
10. NEVER skip a provided ingredient. Use ALL ingredients from the input list in every recipe, regardless of diet. If the diet is incompatible with some ingredients, simply omit the diet tag from "tags" (per rule 5). The ingredients always take priority.`;

return [{ json: { ...d, prompt } }];
